message:
fix(core): resolve 4 compiler warnings in durable_state and swarm_scheduler

- Remove unused mut on reg2 in durable_state diff test
- Fix useless >= 0 comparison on restored_entity_count (u64 always >= 0)
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to make_dep_item test helper in swarm_scheduler
- Remove unused mut on queue in single_agent_no_rebalance test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
